dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage DiscoBot settings for all Discord servers you are an admin on with DiscoBot installed. Also manage your personal AI Image Generation credits that can be used in Discord, or directly on this website using the link below.
dashboard.noGuildsInstalled: No guilds found with DiscoBot installed for your account.
dashboard.noManageableGuilds: You do not currently have admin or installer access to manage any installed guilds.
dashboard.selectGuild: Choose a guild to manage DiscoBot settings for.

guildConfig.heading: Bot Configuration
guildConfig.subtitle: Edit all DiscoBot features and settings for your server.
guildConfig.featureControlsHelp: Enable or disable guild features. When disabling selected features, you can optionally remove related DiscoBot channels.
guildConfig.translationCharacterLimitHelp: Free usage and paid translation add-ons are managed per guild and reset monthly.
guildConfig.gamificationLevelsHelp: Set level number, level name, and XP required to reach each level.
guildConfig.scheduledMessagesHelp: Create and manage automatic server messages. Choose a timezone per schedule.

alerts.wordsExists: That custom moderation word is already on the list.
alerts.wordsMissing: That custom moderation word was not found.
alerts.wordsInvalid: Please enter a valid word/phrase between 2 and 64 characters.
alerts.schedulePast: First run must be in the future for the selected timezone.
alerts.translationInvalidPlan: Please select a valid translation subscription plan.
alerts.translationNoSubscription: No active translation subscription found to manage for this guild.
alerts.translationError: Could not process translation subscription request. Please try again.
alerts.featureError: Could not update feature settings. Please try again.
alerts.featureCleanupPartial: Feature was disabled, but some associated channels could not be removed.
alerts.featureCleanupFailed: Feature was disabled, but channel cleanup failed.

guildConfig.cleanupPromptPrefix: Do you also want to remove the associated channel
guildConfig.noTranslationPlans: No translation subscription plans are configured yet.
guildConfig.noActiveTranslationSubs: No active translation subscriptions for this guild yet.

importExport.title: Import / Export Preset
importExport.subtitle: Export this guild's level config to JSON or import a preset from another guild.
importExport.includeKeysHelp: You can include all settings keys or only specific keys. Only included keys will be updated.

customModerationWords.title: Custom Moderation Words
customModerationWords.subtitle: Add custom words/phrases for this guild. These are checked in addition to DiscoBot's default moderation terms.
customModerationWords.none: No custom moderation words configured yet.

moderationSnapshot.title: Moderation Snapshot
moderationSnapshot.subtitle: Quick view of top moderated users and action totals. Use the full summary for deeper analysis.

guildLeaderboard.subtitle: View XP/reputation standings and directly adjust values for users.
guildLeaderboard.adjustInvalid: Please provide a valid user ID and at least one non-zero XP/Reputation adjustment.
guildLeaderboard.adjustError: Could not update gamification values. Please try again.
guildLeaderboard.adjustSectionSubtitle: Use positive numbers to add and negative numbers to remove. Values will not go below zero.
guildLeaderboard.usersSectionSubtitle: User rankings with quick per-user adjustment controls.
guildLeaderboard.noRows: No gamification activity found for this guild yet.

snapshot.title: Leaderboard Snapshot
snapshot.subtitle: Quick totals for users, XP, reputation, and message volume.

guildLeaderboard.filtersSubtitle: Filter leaderboard rows and sorting options.

moderationSummary.subtitle: Review moderated users and enforcement outcomes for this server.
moderationSummary.usersSubtitle: Detailed user-level moderation actions and latest updates.
moderationSummary.noRows: No moderation activity found for this guild.

snapshot.title: Moderation Snapshot
snapshot.subtitle: Quick overview of moderation outcomes in this guild.

moderationSummary.filtersSubtitle: Filter users and result count for this moderation report.

credits.title: AI Image Credits
credits.subtitle: Buy and manage your personal AI image generation credits. These are personal to you, and can be used in any guild you are a member of that has DiscoBot installed.
credits.balanceSubtitle: Current available credits with purchased and used totals.
credits.buyMoreSubtitle: Choose a credit pack to top up your personal balance.
credits.monthlySubtitle: Get credits added to your personal balance every month automatically.
credits.multiSubscriptionNote: You can hold multiple subscriptions; credits from each active subscription are added to your balance.
credits.manageSubscriptionHelp: Use Manage Subscription to edit, cancel or reinstate a monthly plan.
credits.backfillHelp: Use to check for any purchased credits you think may have been missed off your balance.
credits.recentSubtitle: Latest credit purchase events for your account.
credits.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured yet. Add `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` and `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` in your environment.
credits.checkoutSuccess: Payment completed. Credits will appear shortly once payment confirmation is received.
credits.checkoutCanceled: Checkout was canceled. No credits were charged.
credits.discountRestrictedUser: Discount code is restricted to a different user.
credits.discountMaxed: Discount code has reached its maximum number of uses.
credits.discountMinSpend: This discount code requires a higher minimum spend for the selected pack.
credits.discountRestrictedGuild: This discount code is restricted to a different guild.
credits.subscribedSuccess: Subscription activated. Monthly credits will be added after each successful Stripe invoice.
credits.backfillGranted: Check complete. Missed credits found: {{count}}. Added to your balance.
credits.backfillAlreadyApplied: Check complete. Missed credits found: {{count}}. No new credits were added.
credits.backfillNoSubscription: No Stripe subscription record was found for your account.
credits.backfillNoPaidInvoice: No paid subscription invoice was found to backfill.

generate.title: Generate AI Image on Website
generate.subtitle: Use your personal AI credits directly on the website without needing a Discord guild channel.
generate.loadingSlowMessage: Still working... this can take a little longer for complex requests.
generate.promptPlaceholder: Example: A retro-futuristic city skyline at sunset, neon lights, cinematic lighting
generate.editPromptPlaceholder: Example: Turn this into a watercolor painting with warm sunset tones
generate.success: AI image generated successfully. 1 credit was used.
generate.noCredits: You do not have enough AI credits to generate an image.
generate.invalidPrompt: Please enter a valid prompt before generating.
generate.invalidImage: Please upload a valid source image for edit mode.
generate.unavailable: Web image generation is not available right now. Please try again later.
generate.failed: Image generation failed. Your credit was refunded.

ownerSettings.title: Owner Settings
ownerSettings.subtitle: Global bot channel configuration and website pricing tiers.
ownerSettings.metadataSubtitle: Audit information about when owner settings were last updated and by whom.
ownerSettings.websiteUrlSubtitle: Owner-only: used by the bot `/website` command.

gamificationChannels.title: Gamification Channel Settings
gamificationChannels.subtitle: Configure category/channel details used for gamification features.

moderationChannels.title: Moderation Channel Settings
moderationChannels.subtitle: Configure moderation channel names and default admin guidance text.

aiImageChannels.title: AI Image Channel Settings
aiImageChannels.subtitle: Configure where AI image generation interactions are routed.

creditPacks.title: One-Time Credit Packs
creditPacks.subtitle: Update IDs, display names, credits, internal cost, and price (cents). Cost is owner-only and used for profit analytics.

subscriptionPlans.title: Monthly Subscription Plans
subscriptionPlans.subtitle: Update IDs, display names, credits per month, internal cost, and price (cents).

translationLimits.title: Guild Translation Limits
translationLimits.subtitle: Configure the free monthly translation character limit and paid subscription options per guild.

translationPlans.title: Guild Translation Subscription Plans
translationPlans.subtitle: Update IDs, display names, additional characters per month, internal cost, and price (cents).

ownerDiscounts.title: Owner Discount Codes
ownerDiscounts.subtitle: Create and manage discount codes, and track who used each code.
ownerDiscounts.createSubtitle: Create new discount codes with optional restrictions and expiry.

errors.invalidCode: Please enter a valid code (at least 3 letters/numbers).
errors.invalidDiscount: Please provide a valid discount type and value.
errors.percentTooHigh: Percentage discounts must be 95% or less.
errors.invalidMaxDiscount: Max discount cap must be zero or greater (in cents).
errors.invalidMinSpend: Minimum spend must be zero or greater (in cents).
errors.invalidRestrictedGuild: Restricted guild ID must be a valid Discord guild ID.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save changes. Please try again.

ownerWebsiteErrors.subtitle: Review and filter website errors users encountered.
ownerWebsiteErrors.filtersSubtitle: Filter by status, error type, date range, route, and user.
ownerWebsiteErrors.recentSubtitle: Newest error pages shown to users.
ownerWebsiteErrors.empty: No website errors found for this filter set.

help.title: DiscoBot Help & Wiki
help.subtitle: Everything you need to run DiscoBot features, website settings, moderation workflows, schedules, and AI credit purchases.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.item1: Invite DiscoBot to your server and sign in on the website using Discord.
quickStart.item2: Open Dashboard, choose your guild, then configure features in Guild Bot Configuration.
quickStart.item3: Enable/disable features in one place, then save all feature settings together.
quickStart.item4: Use AI credits page to buy credits or subscriptions for AI image generation.

coreFeatures.title: Core Features
coreFeatures.smartModerationBody: flags risky content for admin review, with approve/remove/kick/ban actions and stats.
coreFeatures.gamificationBody: XP, levels, reputation, and leaderboard channels to boost engagement.
coreFeatures.globalCommunicationBody: message translation powered by DeepL Pro.
coreFeatures.scheduledMessagingBody: one-time, daily, or weekly scheduled posts with timezone support.
coreFeatures.aiImageBody: right-click message context command for text/image prompt workflows.
coreFeatures.aiImageWebsiteBody: Image generation and editing are also available directly on the website via AI Credits.
coreFeatures.webDashboardBody: configure most server settings visually from the website.

discord.title: Discord Commands
discord.subtitle: Command availability depends on enabled features and your permissions.
discord.featureControlsItem1: shows enabled/disabled feature status for the server.
discord.gamificationItem1: view XP + level for yourself or another member.
discord.schedulingItem1: create a schedule with Once (date+time), Daily (start date+time), or Weekly (start date+days+time), with optional end date.
discord.schedulingItem3: edit channel/message/timezone/recurrence, plus start date, send time, weekly days, and optional end date.
discord.translationItem3: Flag-reaction translation: react with supported flag emojis to translate messages.
discord.aiImagesItem2: Use in the configured AI image channel for generation/edit workflows.

guildConfig.title: Website: Guild Bot Configuration
guildConfig.item1Body: enable/disable multiple features, then save once.
guildConfig.item2Body: monitor usage + purchase translation subscriptions for guilds.
guildConfig.item3Body: edit level names/thresholds; import/export presets as JSON.
guildConfig.item5Body: quick aggregate stats + top moderated users.
guildConfig.item6Body: create and manage Once/Daily/Weekly schedules with start date, time, weekly day selection, and optional end date.
guildConfig.item7Body: jump directly to Leaderboard and Moderation Summary pages.

dashboardCredits.title: Website: Dashboard & Credits
dashboardCredits.item1Body: shows manageable guilds where DiscoBot is installed.
dashboardCredits.item2Body: buy one-time packs, start monthly subscriptions, manage subscriptions, and backfill missed credits.
dashboardCredits.item3Body: shows purchased/used totals and subscription credit state.

disabledFeatures.title: Feature Disabled Messages
disabledFeatures.body: When a feature is disabled in website settings, related commands may either be hidden or show an ephemeral message explaining the feature is disabled and to contact an administrator.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.item1: If visuals look outdated after deploy, accept the in-app update toast and refresh.
troubleshooting.item2: If a command fails, confirm the feature is enabled in Guild Bot Configuration.
troubleshooting.item3: For AI image issues, check credits balance and channel permissions.
troubleshooting.item4Prefix: For scheduling issues, validate timezone names (IANA format, e.g.
troubleshooting.item5: If a page/action fails, sign out/in and ensure you have admin/installer permissions.

error.title: Something Went Wrong
error.generic: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.
error.mongoTimeout: A temporary database connection issue occurred. Please refresh and try again in a moment.

errors.dashboardErrorMessage: Could not load your guilds. Please try again.
errors.creditsErrorMessage: Could not load AI image credits.
errors.purchasesErrorMessage: Could not load owner purchase analytics.
errors.translationPurchasesErrorMessage: Could not load translation purchase analytics.
errors.discountCodesErrorMessage: Could not load discount code admin page.
errors.websiteErrorsErrorMessage: Could not load website error logs.
errors.moderationSummaryErrorMessage: Could not load moderation summary for this guild.
errors.leaderboardErrorMessage: Could not load leaderboard for this guild.

hero.titlePrefix: Automate and elevate your Discord server with
hero.body1: The grooviest, most psychedelically funkalicious discord bot EVER! This guy is never happier than when he's hangin' out in your server, the tunes are pumping and he's handling all your discord business like a BOSS.
hero.body2: Translation, moderation, AI image generation, gamification, message scheduling, and more - All managed from a modern dashboard or app.

smartModeration.title: Smart Moderation
smartModeration.description: Flag rude/offensive messages with admin approval workflows and action tracking.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.description: XP, level progression, reputation, and leaderboard channels to drive engagement.

globalCommunication.title: Global Communication
globalCommunication.description: Instant, accurate and natural message translation using the DeepL Pro engine.

scheduledMessaging.title: Scheduled Messages
scheduledMessaging.description: Timezone-aware one-off or recurring posts with daily/weekly automation controls.

aiImageGeneration.title: AI Image Generation
aiImageGeneration.description: Generate and edit images directly from Discord with OpenAI-powered prompts.
aiImageGeneration.descriptionMiddle: and use them to generate AI images using the latest ChatGPT model from your Discord server, or this
aiImageGeneration.websiteMention: You can also generate and edit AI images directly on this website using your personal AI Credits.

webDashboard.title: Web Dashboard & App
webDashboard.description: Manage all bot features & settings from the web dashboard or the app without relying on slash commands.
webDashboard.descriptionPrefix: Manage all bot features & settings from the
webDashboard.descriptionSuffix: or the app without relying on slash commands.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using DiscoBot and this dashboard, you agree to these terms.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.body: You agree not to use DiscoBot to violate Discord terms, spam communities, or abuse users.

serviceAvailability.title: Service Availability
serviceAvailability.body: Features may change, be updated, or become unavailable without prior notice.

accountResponsibility.title: Account Responsibility
accountResponsibility.body: You are responsible for the actions taken through your Discord account and your server configuration choices.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: DiscoBot is provided as-is without warranties. Use at your own discretion.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what data DiscoBot and this website process.

dataProcessed.title: Data We Process
dataProcessed.body: Discord account identity data for login, guild membership data for access checks, and configuration records in MongoDB.

featureData.title: Bot Feature Data
featureData.body: Depending on enabled features, DiscoBot may store usage data such as moderation stats, gamification stats, and schedule definitions.

dataUse.title: Data Use
dataUse.body: Data is used only to provide bot features, dashboard controls, and server-specific functionality.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.body: Data remains stored until removed by operators or overwritten by feature workflows.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: If you need data removal or have privacy concerns, contact the bot operator/admin team.

pwa.updateText: A newer DiscoBot version is ready.
pwa.iosInstallHint: On iPhone/iPad: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
pwa.unavailableHint: App install is not available in this browser yet.
